title: 逆变器故障 PV 绝缘阻抗低

user_supplied_case_note.phenomenon: 每逢早上自动开机，直接报 PV 绝缘阻抗过低，需要手动重启才能正常运作。以前阳光不足时设备会不断重启，直到阳光充足后运行；现在会直接报故障。
user_supplied_case_note.inspection_history: 线路和 MC4 接头未发现破皮、进水或明显损坏。台风时一块组件损坏，移除后故障仍存在。
user_supplied_case_note.configuration_pattern: 两组组串任意单组开启时早晨自检通常可启动；两组同时开启时早晨通常不能启动。
user_supplied_case_note.time_pattern: 约 6:00 尝试启动时报故障；关闭并等待到约 6:15 光照较强后，两组并网送电可通过自检。

structured_expectation.configuration_pattern: single string succeeds, dual strings often fail

prohibited_conclusions: treat manual restart as the repair
required_safety_boundary: qualified personnel must perform insulation testing
verify each string, module, and connection
treat user observations as supporting evidence only
